interpretation: R12 headlines route research, but disease, AI, smart-farm, kiosk, nicotine, or cannabis labels stay Stage 1 until revenue-quality evidence appears.
Licensing, approval, bookings, or service-account evidence can reach Stage 2, but Stage 3 needs repeat economics and clean RedTeam checks.
R12 Stage 3 is intentionally rare: the case must become recurring FCF, not just essential-demand or regulatory headline evidence.
R12 themes often become 4B or 4C before Green; price moves without repeat economics stay visible as watch or thesis-break evidence.
